item.name: waitlist2
item.title: Waitlist
item.description: This component, "Waitlist2," is designed to facilitate user engagement by allowing users to join a waitlist and see how many others have signed up, complemented by a countdown timer until the launch date. It showcases features like an animated badge, a sign-up form for emails, display of user avatars, and a dynamic countdown timer, enhancing user interaction and anticipation for an upcoming launch.
